notes: v0.1.4: Smaller install (~114 MB; removed the unused browser engine), hardened auto-update (HTTPS-only + SHA-256 integrity check before installing), and ~50 reliability and correctness fixes from a full code review (uploads, VIRIN handling, sign-in token safety, document parsing, settings safety). Setup steps corrected: register http://oauth.localhost as the redirect URL, and upload access is granted by your unit.
